core_mechanism: a parameter-controlled deformation of a Lie algebra of symmetry generators (deforming the generators' commutation/composition relations) together with the construction of an irreducible representation carrying that deformed algebra, in which the deformation of the algebra is locked to a deformation of the interaction/coupling law
brief_reason: The abstract's method rests on finding a fully characterized deformed Poincare/Galilei symmetry algebra, building a single-particle model carrying an irreducible representation of it, and showing the two-particle generators' structure is intimately connected to the deformation of the interaction law.
